query:
-- Fix 3: linkedin-source contacts with email AND linkedin URL — these are real people, promote to send_ready
UPDATE contacts
SET contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
WHERE contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
  AND enrichmentSource = 'linkedin'
  AND email IS NOT NULL
  AND linkedin IS NOT NULL
  AND crmOrphan = false;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Fix 3: linkedin-source contacts with email AND linkedin URL — these are real people, promote to send_ready
UPDATE contacts
SET contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
WHERE contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
  AND enrichmentSource = 'linkedin'
  AND email IS NOT NULL
  AND linkedin IS NOT NULL
  AND crmOrphan = false;
